TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dāvis_Bertāns, title = Dāvis_Bertāns, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dāvis_Bertāns} }

S.FORM: == Dāvis Bertāns == Dāvis Bertāns hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Dāvis Bertāns, squliq na p'unro. 1992 kawas 11 byacing 12 ryax,Dāvis Bertāns htgan beh Latvijas Republika unro' ngasal. qsuyan mlikuy ru yaba qutux mari punro.hiya qsuyan milky raral ga maki New Orleans Pelicans ,hiya yaya ga,qutux 體育 sinsiy ru wagiq 賽艇 punro'. Bertāns trang laqi ga,maki Rūjiena suruw lga musa Rīga.hiya baq kmal ke' na Serbian. pincyugan nya Riga 2007-2008 kawas pspung ryax, Bertāns maki ASK Kadeti II 效力. 2008-2010 kawas hiya maki Latvia's pspung BAA Riga.raral ga, hiya maki 2008-2009 kawas pspung ASK Riga hlahuy ru 2009-2010 kawas pspung BK Keizarmezs tmwang sazing wagiq msqun pspung. Union Olimpija ru BK Barons msqun t'ring 2010-2011 kawas lga,2010 kawas 11 byacing pspung, Bertāns ru Slovenian hlahuy(Union Olimpija) 簽 biru. 2010-2011 kawas pspung lga, Bertāns te 42 Indiana magal maki 2011 kawas. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Dāvis Bertāns sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Dāvis Bertāns == Dāvis Bertāns hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Dāvis Bertāns, squliq na p'unro. 1992 kawas 11 byacing 12 ryax,Dāvis Bertāns htgan beh Latvijas Republika unro' ngasal. qsuyan mlikuy ru yaba qutux mari punro.hiya qsuyan milky raral ga maki New Orleans Pelicans ,hiya yaya ga,qutux 體育 sinsiy ru wagiq 賽艇 punro'. Bertāns trang laqi ga,maki Rūjiena suruw lga musa Rīga.hiya baq kmal ke' na Serbian. pincyugan nya Riga 2007-2008 kawas pspung ryax, Bertāns maki ASK Kadeti II 效力. 2008-2010 kawas hiya maki Latvia's pspung BAA Riga.raral ga, hiya maki 2008-2009 kawas pspung ASK Riga hlahuy ru 2009-2010 kawas pspung BK Keizarmezs tmwang sazing wagiq msqun pspung. Union Olimpija ru BK Barons msqun t'ring 2010-2011 kawas lga,2010 kawas 11 byacing pspung, Bertāns ru Slovenian hlahuy(Union Olimpija) 簽 biru. 2010-2011 kawas pspung lga, Bertāns te 42 Indiana magal maki 2011 kawas. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Dāvis Bertāns sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ***is~ɕ βert*ns~ɕ == ***is~ɕ βert*ns~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ***is~ɕ βert*ns~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,***is~ɕ βert*ns~ɕ ħtɣan βeħ lat*ijas~ɕ repuβlika unroʔ ŋas~ɕal. qs~ɕujan mlikuj ru jaβa qutux mari punro.ħija qs~ɕujan milkj raral ɣa maki new orleans~ɕ peliʦ~ʨans~ɕ ,ħija jaja ɣa,qutux ** s~ɕins~ɕij ru waɣiq ** punroʔ. βert*ns~ɕ traŋ laqi ɣa,maki r*jiena s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa r*ɣa.ħija βaq kmal keʔ na s~ɕerβian. pinʦ~ʨjuɣan nja riɣa ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, βert*ns~ɕ maki as~ɕk ka*eti ii **. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ħija maki lat*iaʔs~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ βaa riɣa.raral ɣa, ħija maki ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ as~ɕk riɣa ħlaħuj ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ βk keizarmezs~ɕ tmwaŋ s~ɕaziŋ waɣiq ms~ɕqun ps~ɕpuŋ. union olimpija ru βk βarons~ɕ ms~ɕqun tʔriŋ ****-**** kawas~ɕ lɣa,**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ps~ɕpuŋ, βert*ns~ɕ ru s~ɕlo*enian ħlaħuj(union olimpija) * βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ lɣa, βert*ns~ɕ te ** in*iana maɣal maki **** kawas~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ rjax qnxan nqu ***is~ɕ βert*ns~ɕ s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
